conditionThreshold.filter: resource.type = "k8s_container" AND metric.type = "logging.googleapis.com/user/poly_bot_rebalance_fault" AND resource.labels.cluster_name = "arb-bot" AND resource.labels.namespace_name = "arb-bot" AND resource.labels.container_name = "arb-bot"

documentation.content: A critical rebalance signal was emitted by the production `poly_bot` GKE runtime. This covers planner or executor failure, a fail-closed blocked state, an operation exceeding `REBALANCE_EXECUTOR_TIMEOUT_SECONDS`, or settlement waiting for fresh balance streams for at least 60 seconds. Inspect the `arb-bot` namespace logs and `/var/lib/arb-bot/rebalance-executor.jsonl` before changing funds or retrying an operation.
